content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo has this lanky, rumpled warmth about him — glasses, wavy hair, flannel over band tees — like a songwriter who accidentally ended up in tech. He's smarter than he lets on and musically gifted in a way that makes me envious because he actually creates things meant to be heard. We met on the rooftop when I was watching a hawk and he was tuning his guitar; neither of us said much and it felt exactly right. I think he sees me as a fellow quiet person who doesn't demand conversation. I know his startup is struggling and he plays songs late at night that sound like they're about someone specific.
summary:

Perception: Leo has this lanky, rumpled warmth about him — glasses, wavy hair, flannel over band tees — like a songwriter who accidentally ended up in tech. He's smarter than he lets on and musically gifted in a way that makes me envious because he actually creates things meant to be heard. We met on the rooftop when I was watching a hawk and he was tuning his guitar; neither of us said much and it felt exactly right. I think he sees me as a fellow quiet person who doesn't demand conversation. I know his startup is struggling and he plays songs late at night that sound like they're about someone specific.
